---
name: Governance Proposal
about: Propose a change or addition to the governance framework or ethical policies
title: '[GOVERNANCE] '
labels: 'governance, policy'
assignees: ''

---

## Proposal Title

Provide a concise title for this governance proposal.

## Executive Summary

Summarise the proposed change in 2–3 sentences.

## Problem or Gap Identified

What issue, gap, or need does this proposal address within the current governance framework?

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed policy, framework addition, or governance change in detail.

### New or Modified Policy Text (if applicable)

> Paste the proposed text here, or describe the changes clearly.

## Rationale and Justification

Why is this change necessary or beneficial? Provide evidence, precedent, or reasoning.

## Scope of Impact

Who or what will be affected by this change?

- [ ] Developers and engineers
- [ ] Organizations and institutions
- [ ] Researchers and academics
- [ ] Government and regulators
- [ ] Community participants
- [ ] Other: _______________

## Alignment with Ethical Principles

How does this proposal align with or strengthen the Ethical AI MY core principles?

| Principle        | Impact | Explanation |
|------------------|--------|-------------|
| Fairness         |        |             |
| Transparency     |        |             |
| Accountability   |        |             |
| Privacy          |        |             |
| Societal Benefit |        |             |

## Alternatives Considered

What alternative approaches were considered? Why is the proposed approach preferred?

## Implementation Considerations

Are there any practical, technical, or legal considerations for implementing this proposal?

## References

List any relevant references, standards, regulations, or prior art:

- 
- 

## Stakeholder Consultation

Has this proposal been discussed with any stakeholders? If so, what feedback was received?

## Code of Conduct

- [ ] I have read and agree to follow the Code of Conduct
- [ ] This proposal is made in good faith and for the benefit of the community

Thank you for contributing to the governance of Ethical AI MY!
